Off Calendar Sep-21-2015 Continued To Oct-19-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sam Ferdows (via court call) for (administrator) Zhang Hou.

Mr. Ferdows apologized for the delay, stated that he thought the administrator wanted to terminate the matter due to no assets, that they have now found funds, that they can file the inventory & appraisal in a couple of weeks but will need additional time to file the petition for final distribution. The status on filing the inventory and appraisal & petition for final distribution was continued to October 19, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)
